overview.description: The Corgi 0-5 Year High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (CHYG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks an index of US dollar-denominated high yield corporate bonds with remaining maturities of less than five years. The fund provides exposure to below-investment-grade debt issued by US and non-US companies. CHYG was launched on Jun 4, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
